SHOWERS ASSOCIATED WITH A PASSING COLD FRONT PRODUCED A WIND GUST OF 41 MPH (36KT) AT THE CMAN STATION LOCATED AT FOWEY ROCKS. THE SENSOR IS ELEVATED.

LAW ENFORCEMENT REPORTED THAT AREAS EAST OF I 95 ON HOLLYWOOD BLVD COMPLETELY FLOODED, NUMEROUS CARS STRANDED AND THE FIRE DEPARTMENT IS CURRENTLY CONDUCTING RESCUES AS WATER HAS BEEN ENTERING HOMES IN THAT AREAS.
FLL - FORT LAUDERDALE/HOLLYWOOD INTL AIRPORT CLOSED DUE TO FLASH FLOODING AS OF 340 AM.
